results.title: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH) Stock Price, News, Quote & History
UnitedHealth: UNH Stock Price Quote & News | Robinhood
UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH) Latest Stock News & Headlines
UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH) Latest Stock News | Seeking Alpha

summary_extracted: Q1 2026 adjusted EPS $7.23 beat estimates of $6.56 (+10.21%); stock surged ~14.5% post-earnings on April 21. Full-year 2026 guidance raised to $18.25+. Medical cost ratio improved to 84% from 85% a year ago. UNH and CVS Health standardized prior authorization data requirements as an industry initiative to reduce delays. Goldman Sachs added UNH to Conviction Buy List.
